name: coOnUploadResponse
title: coOnUploadResponse
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coOnUploadResponse( dword nodeId, dword index, dword subIndex, dword size );

This function is called when the response to an SDO upload was received (see coUpload). Now the data can be accessed with coThisGetSigned, coThisGetUnsigned, coThisGetFloat, coThisGetData, and coThisGetSize. Note The access to the transmitted data is only possible within this function.
Note The access to the transmitted data is only possible within this function.
Note The access to the transmitted data is only possible within this function.
index Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
subIndex Sub index of the object, value range 0..255
size Size of the data byte, value range 0..4.294.967.295

Example void coOnUploadResponse( dword nodeId, dword index, dword subIndex, dword size ){ dword errCode[1]; dword value; value = coThisGetUnsigned( errCode ); write( "Upload Response Data 0x%X", value );}
